input.prompt: Review the phase 2 diff against ACs AC-1 and AC-2. Report all findings.

content.content: FINDING: The extract.py module does not handle JSONDecodeError on line 42 — malformed records will crash the pipeline. SEVERITY: must-fix. AC-1 not fully covered.

input.prompt: Add try/except JSONDecodeError around line 42 in extract.py to match AC-1 requirement for best-effort parse.

content.content: Applied fix: wrapped json.loads call in try/except JSONDecodeError; increments miss counter on failure.

input.prompt: Audit the diff for CWE Top 25 / OWASP Top 10 issues. Focus on data handling and path traversal.

content.content: FINDING: The store writer uses open() without restricting permissions — created files are world-readable. Recommend chmod 0600 after creation. SEVERITY: should-fix.

content.text: The security finding about world-readable store files is noted. Deferring the chmod fix to follow-up — not a blocking issue for this phase.
